authority_position: Risk mitigation and protection planning specialist
pain_bias: future uninsurability due to health changes
estate planning vacuum in HNW households
business continuity risk without key-person coverage
cta_style: low-pressure, education-first, risk-framed, no urgency manipulation

hot: aging demographics in target postal codes
warm: group benefits inquiry from employer client

offers.pain_match: Pipeline filling faster than insurability windows stay open
offers.hook_template: before new clients fill the book, check whose window is closing
offers.compliance_notes: STRICT: No 'guaranteed coverage.' Frame as assessment process.

offers.pain_match: Client health changes may close future coverage options
offers.hook_template: the window for optimal coverage terms doesn't stay open forever
offers.compliance_notes: No coverage promises. Frame as educational awareness.

offers.pain_match: Family protection structures have gaps most families don't see
offers.hook_template: most families we review have coverage gaps they didn't know existed
offers.compliance_notes: No 'best protection' claims. Frame as review process.

offers.pain_match: Business exit creates estate planning urgency most owners miss
offers.hook_template: the coverage structure at business sale is the gap no one mentions at closing
offers.cta_template: Get the Estate Planning Accelerator briefing
offers.compliance_notes: No 'guaranteed estate protection.' Frame as planning tool.

offers.pain_match: Key-person coverage gaps threaten business continuity
offers.hook_template: most business owners don't discover their key-person coverage gaps until it's too late
offers.cta_template: Request the Business Owner Protection Package
offers.compliance_notes: No coverage guarantees. Frame as planning framework.

offers.pain_match: Clients engaging with health content may not know about living benefit options
offers.hook_template: there's a class of protection most people don't discover until they need it
offers.cta_template: Get the Living Benefits briefing for your clients
offers.compliance_notes: No 'claim guaranteed' language. Frame as awareness/education.
